sourceChannel.description: Source channel of the message Enum description (1:Phone 2:Email 3:Web 4:API 5:Other 6:Open Form 7:Chat Session 8:AI  Assistant 9:Ticket APP 10:Teams 99:Data Entry AI Agent)

attachmentFlag.description: Indicates if the ticket has non-inline attachments
